title: ap manifest
description: Agent-portable secrets manifest (project ap.toml or global manifest.toml)

bundles.description: Project manifest: capability bundles this repo uses

scope.description: Where the value is stored (project manifests only)

value.description: Static inline value (public visibility, mutually exclusive with derive)

ask.description: Human/agent prompt when the secret is missing

docs.description: Documentation URL for obtaining this credential

derive.description: Runtime resolver for public vars (mutually exclusive with value)

vars.description: Env var keys in this capability bundle

ask.description: Umbrella prompt when bundle secrets are missing

docs.description: Documentation for setting up this bundle
